content.en:
"A small mountain village!"

Ye Tian looked around and determined that the environment he was in should not be in any danger.

But this body is too weak, such a body can't even perform the ancient arts, and if you force it, it will collapse.

And the Canghe Realm is not open for a long time, so it is necessary to improve the strength of this physical body in a short period of time, at least to the extent that it can perform the ancient arts.

Moreover, I have to inquire about the news of the search for Canghezhu.

So, time is tight.

"It's not easy to get the Canghe Pearl, the key is that I don't know much about the Canghe Realm, and the Lord of Xuanchen is also here for the first time, and the news I get is all heard of, and it may not be accurate. "

Ye Tian muttered.

It's a pity that he is reincarnated this time, and the mark of the copying talent cannot be carried, so he can't copy the body now.

"Let's first look for resources around to refine the flesh body and improve our cultivation!"

Ye Tian decided.

When he walked out of the house, he was greeted by many people, all from the same mountain village.

Of course, this body is not a human race, but it looks like a human, but the skin is very green.

When Ye Tian left the mountain village, he was reminded by many people.

"Xiaoshan, don't go out of the village, there are a lot of weird things outside the village now. "

An old man reminded.

However.

Ye Tian didn't care, even if his physical body was weak, he could still exert an incomparably terrifying strength, which was not something that people in these mountain villages could imagine.

Soon, he was far away from the mountain village.

Rumble!!!!

A strange-looking monster with a foul smell emerged from the void and immediately attacked Ye Tian.

"Look for death!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

He pulled out a piece of grass casually, second to none, and this grass instantly pierced the strange body, killing it in an instant and turning it into ashes.

At this moment, a bead fell from the monster's body.

"Hey, the energy contained in this bead is okay, and it can be used as a resource to refine the flesh!"

He immediately swallowed the bead in one gulp, and then began refining it.

Rumble!!!!

The weak body became stronger at a speed visible to the naked eye.

Twice!

Thrice!

Five times over!

After a period of time, he completely refined this strange lord, and his physical body was ten times stronger.

The reason why he has improved so much is because this body is too weak and the gap between them is too big, so he has completely absorbed the Refining Monster Pearl, so he has such a big improvement.

"There are very few resources around here, and sure enough, as the Lord of Xuanchen said, the resources of this Canghe Realm are too ordinary, and there are not many resources suitable for this physical body to improve cultivation, or hunt monsters, absorb their beads, and use them to improve cultivation, this way to improve cultivation is the fastest. "

Ye Tian felt that the other Heavenly Ancestors who had entered the Canghe Realm were also using this method to improve their cultivation.

Subsequently.

He uses a secret art to find the treacherous.

Airplanes!!!!

The strange fluctuations dispersed, and soon a group of strange nests were discovered by him.

Wow!

Ye Tian moved quickly, and after a while, he found this group of monsters.

After a few breaths, he killed all of them.

Subsequently.

He began to refine these strange pearls, and his cultivation strength increased wildly.

Ten times over!

Hundredfold!

It didn't take long for him to increase three hundred times, and his physical body was strong enough to break the void here.

"Go on!"

Ye Tian went to find other monsters again.

As time passed, his body became stronger and stronger, and his strength became stronger and stronger!

However, if you want to support yourself to perform the ancient arts, the current physical body is still too far away.

Time flies.

One after another in the Bone Transformation Realm were frantically improving their strength, and their strength had already surpassed the top masters of the native residents of the Canghe Realm.

Some of them have already begun to look for Canghe Pearl, once they find Canghe Pearl, even if their strength is not good, as long as they leave in time, they can take away a Canghe Pearl!

Of course.

If you want to really break the bottleneck and make a breakthrough in cultivation, one Canghe pearl is definitely not enough.

When the time comes, many bone transformation realms are afraid that they will kill other bone transformation realms and snatch the Canghe beads on the bodies of other bone transformation realms.

Therefore, if you don't have the strength, unless you are not greedy and only snatch a Canghe Pearl, even if you snatch the Canghe Pearl, you will be killed.

Time flies.

Gradually, I was lucky enough to have a bone transformation realm, and I found a Canghe pearl.

......

"The strength of my body is countless times stronger than it was at the beginning, and it is already comparable to a high-level immeasurable lifeform, and it can barely perform the immeasurable magic technique. "

Ye Tian muttered.

He was also ready to improve his cultivation while looking for Canghe Pearls.

Moreover, with the strength of his current body, he could go anywhere in the entire Canghe Realm, just to avoid encountering some reincarnated bodies in the Bone Transformation Realm.

"Canghe beads are very rare, the natives can't refine them, they will only be regarded as holy relics, and the indigenous forces in the Canghe realm may have Canghe beads. Either look for it yourself, or find the indigenous forces. "

Ye Tian decided to go to the indigenous forces of the Canghe Realm first to see if they had Canghe Beads.

But he wasn't the only one who thought of the bone transformation realm here, so he didn't feel any hope.

......

Canghe Ancient City.

This is the center of the Canghe Realm, and it is also the most powerful place, where countless powerhouses of the Canghe Realm gather.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the ancient city of Canghe.

"I'll go, sure enough, I'm not the only one who has come to the bone transformation realm!"

Ye Tian could easily sense the aura of the strong people inside the Canghe Ancient City, these strong people were definitely not the natives of the Canghe Realm, the natives could not be so powerful, they could only be reincarnated in the Bone Transformation Realm.

And at the same time that Ye Tian spied on them, they also spied on Ye Tian.

But they haven't found Canghezhu yet, so they shouldn't be able to do anything with each other.

Entered the ancient city of Canghe.

Ye Tian visited several forces and interrogated them, but none of them came up with any useful information.

Subsequently, he no longer asked Canghe Zhu, but asked for information about the Strange Pearl, and really found useful information.

"The Hidden River. "

This is somewhere in the Canghe Realm, and there are a lot of weird things in it.

Swish!

Ye Tian quickly left the ancient city of Canghe and headed for Youhe.

He currently needs to kill a large number of monsters, obtain a large number of monster pearls, and then improve his cultivation strength.

When his strength improves, he can snatch the Canghe Pearl!

And ordinary monsters are useless to him, but the hidden river is the most dangerous place in the Canghe realm, and there are still many powerful monsters there, so it is of some use to him to improve his strength.

Soon.

And he came to the river.
